title: NetOps - Firewall Version and Content Upgrade
content:
Network operations playbook that updates the version and content of the firewall. You must have Superuser permissions to update the PAN-OS version.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (PAN-OS, xsoar-supported).

Inputs — target_version: Target PAN-OS version to which to upgrade..

Integrations/scripts used: Panorama.

      description: |-
        Use this playbook as a sub-playbook to block execution of the master playbook until a remote action is complete.
        This playbook implements polling by continuously running the command in Step \#2 until the operation completes.
        The remote action should have the following structure:

        1. Initiate the operation.
        2. Poll to check if the operation completed.
        3. (optional) Get the results of the operation.
      playbookName: GenericPolling
      type: playbook
      iscommand: false
      brand: ""

    scriptarguments:

      Interval:
        simple: "1"
      PollingCommandArgName:
        simple: job_id
      PollingCommandName:
        simple: pan-os-content-update-download-status
      Timeout:
        simple: "10"
      dt:
        simple: Panorama.Content.Download(val.Status !== 'Completed').JobID

    loop:
      iscommand: false
      exitCondition: ""
      wait: 1
